scripts.dev: bun run dev:proxy && concurrently "bun --watch run server/index.ts" "cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev"
scripts.dev:dump:ac-evo: bun run dev:proxy && concurrently "bun --watch run server/index.ts --record=ac-evo" "cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev"
scripts.dev:dump:acc: bun run dev:proxy && concurrently "bun --watch run server/index.ts --record=acc" "cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev"
scripts.dev:dump:f1: bun run dev:proxy && concurrently "bun --watch run server/index.ts --record=f1-2025" "cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev"
scripts.dev:dump:fm: bun run dev:proxy && concurrently "bun --watch run server/index.ts --record=fm-2023" "cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev"
scripts.dev:client: bun run dev:proxy && cd client && portless raceiq bun run dev
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && rm -rf dist/* && cd client && bun vite build && cd .. && bun scripts/copy-shared-data.ts && bun scripts/copy-client-dist.ts && NODE_ENV=production bun build --compile --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' server/bootstrap.ts --outfile dist/raceiq
scripts.record:demo: cd playwright && DEMO_START_FRAME=28% DEMO_MAX_FRAMES=2700 bunx playwright test --project=record-demo
scripts.render:demo: ffmpeg -y -framerate 60 -i /tmp/raceiq-demo-frames/frame-%06d.jpg -vf scale=1280:720 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -crf 30 assets/demo-render.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -framerate 60 -i /tmp/raceiq-demo-frames/frame-%06d.jpg -vf scale=1280:720 -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf 32 -b:v 0 assets/demo-render.webm
